definition:
1. a broad strap for bearing  anything 
from Root ! τλα, * τλάω, whence also the hero Telamon took his name, compare Ἄτλας 
2. a leathern strap  or belt , for bearing both shield or sword, (Homer) 
3. a broad linen bandage  for wounds, (Iliad by Homer); for swathing mummies, (Herdotus Historicus) (ML)
